body.title: CLOSED: Migrate learner.py SQLite-isms to native Postgres
body.result: learner.py migrated: 9 ?→%s sites, SELECT changes()→rowcount; Calibre SQLite queries left intentionally. 20 tests pass. commit b16f9389
body.description:
learner.py:898-911 still uses ? placeholders in UPDATE reading_list statements and SELECT changes() to check rowcount. Both are SQLite-isms: ? must become %s, SELECT changes() must become using conn.rowcount or RETURNING. This was missed in the Phase A inventory. After this ticket and T-sqlite-out-learner complete, the _translate_insert_or_replace and _INSTR_RE can be stripped from _PGConnWrapper.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/learner.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite, test-plan-or-why-not
**Scope boundary:** IN: learner.py ?→%s, SELECT changes()→rowcount. OUT: _PGConnWrapper cleanup (separate ticket after this).
**Test plan:** run tests/test_learner.py or full suite after migration
**Pass condition:** learner.py has no ? placeholders, no SELECT changes(); tests pass
